feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Keep a Button Always Active in SAP Fiori Elements (RAP)?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am developing a Fiori Elements application using RESTful Application Programming (RAP). I have added a custom button (e.g., "KURBUTON"), but it appears inactive (disabled).  However, I want this button to be always active, regardless of whether any selections are made.

Here is the code I used for the button:

projection;

//strict ( 2 );

 

define behavior for ZC_ZBA_P_01 //alias <alias_name>

{

// use create;

// use update;

// use delete;

use action KURBUTON ;

 

// use function kurbuton;

 

}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


managed implementation in class zbp_i_zba_m_001 unique;

//strict ( 2 );

 

define behavior for ZI_ZBA_M_001 //alias <alias_name>

persistent table I_ExchangeRateRawData

lock master

authorization master ( instance )

//etag master <field_name>

{

// create;

// update;

// delete;

// field ( readonly ) ExchangeRateType, SourceCurrency, TargetCurrency, ValidityStartDate;

 

action ( features: instance) KURBUTON result[1]$self;

 

//function kurbuton result [0..*] $self;

}

entry.title: Redefine or Extend FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER
entry.content: I want to Redefine FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER in order to extend the entity sets to add some fields, but when I try to edit FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER I get a message that editing is prohibited because its SAP standard. But according to the SAP help SAP Help and blogs Blogs I should be able to do it? What am I missing?

entry.title: How to identify the Odata Name and Odata DPC Ext
entry.content: How to identify the Odata Name and Odata DPC Ext using the Odata Service ? what tcode and table I can use?

entry.title: Smarttable fields not become editable when I press the edit button
entry.content:
Hello all

In my SmartTable (UI5) i set my EntitySet which comes from Rap Backend. Here the fields are set as read only. When i bind this fields to smartField it works as expected. The Fields are read only. I want that when I press the toggle button display/edit some columns to become editable but I do not succeed.

 

< smartTable:SmartTable id="LineItemsSmartTable" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" smartFilterId="smartFilterBar" tableType="ResponsiveTable"
                placeToolbarInTable="true" enableExport="true" beforeExport="onBeforeExport" useVariantManagement="true" useTablePersonalisation="true" header="Line Items"
                showRowCount="true" persistencyKey="listReportFloorplanTable" enableAutoBinding="true" class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"
                enableAutoColumnWidth="true" editTogglable="true" showDetailsButton="true" detailsButtonSetting="Medium,Low" demandPopin="true"
                app:useSmartField = "true" editToggled="onEditToggled">
                    <smartTable:layoutData>
                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData2" growFactor="1" baseSize="0%"/>
                    </smartTable:layoutData>
                    <m:Table id="_IDGenTable" sticky="ColumnHeaders,HeaderToolbar" growing="true" growingThreshold="20" />
                </smartTable:SmartTable>
This is my smart table code.
Does anyone know why I might be having trouble getting my SmartField to render in edit mode? No matter what I do, it seems to insist on being display-only.

entry.title: Custom Class inside Custom Logic App
entry.content:
Hello Community

     To write logic for one of Flexi workflows ( I am on Release S4 2023/FPS02), I need to use a custom class inside Custom Logic App (web based editor). Even after releasing the Custom Class with "Use System-Internally (Contract C1)" , it is not producing results. Am I missing any vital step ?

Regards,

Singh

entry.title: Table Logs
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible in SAP ECC to check the logs of the standard table / custom table, like logs when the standard/custom table was read or access the table. for modification of standard table, I know I can check the logs in CDHDR and CDPOS table but how about the read ?

entry.title: Execute Schedule JOB and send the Report Result in e-mail
entry.content:
Hello Community , 

I have created a JOB that runs a Report with a specific Variant every morning.
It normally sends it to my Workplace within SAP and with an Attach file of the execute.
How can this Export be sent to my e-mail along with the attach File of the Report?
Can you help me?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: When uploading bank statement in FF_5, the items got cleared on account incorrectly.
entry.content:
When bank statement is uploaded through FF_5, the items at subledger level are getting cleared incorrectly. The subledger posting is done for 135000 amount where it should not have done against it as the correct amount from the xml file was 134975. In spite of the 25 dollars difference, it is clearing against 135000. 

I have debugged and check the code, but not able to make progress with the issue. Any help is appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: PDF file upload for sales order
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I'm working on a CRM 7.0 system. My scenario is the following:
A third-party software needs to call the CRM, which in turn will have to call SAP S/4HANA to attach a PDF file to a sales order.

Are there any BAPIs or RFCs that I can use to achieve this?

entry.title: Sending log data to SIEM
entry.content: Hello everyone, I have activated the audit logs on SAP CRM 7.0. These logs generate a file in the file system that needs to be collected by the SIEM. However, the SIEM agent is currently unable to read the file format, possibly due to the encoding used when the files were written. Has anyone ever faced a similar situation? If so, how did you solve it?

entry.title: SAP GUI screen design problem with certain themes
entry.content:
Hi all,

Here are two screenshots of the same program with the same data but the top one has Quartz Theme and the bottom one has SAP Signature Theme.

My problem is that the Alv grid that's in the bottom box grows to large in Quartz theme and extends it's custom container past it's designated position. It then drags some other boxes positions with it and causes blank spaces in the middle of the screen. I'm having this issue in multiple screens in multiple programs.

Does anyone here know what the problem is and how to solve it? 

Thanks,
Birgir

entry.title: How to create dynamic graphic images in adobe forms sap abap
entry.content: I want to create a chart graph and pie chart in Adobe Forms with dynamically incoming data as in the example below. I tried to print a chart created with CL_GUI_CHART_ENGINE to Adobe Forms. Has anyone done this before?

entry.title: INSERT FROM SELECT - The expression that contains "BUKRS" can get null values since it contains...
entry.content:
Hello,

I've got this ABAP syntax check warning for all key fields of ZTABLE (BUKRS, etc.) of below ABAP code:

The expression that contains "BUKRS" can get null values since it contains fields that were not created with "Initial Values" in the dictionary.

Syntax check internal message code: INSERT 211.

ABAP code (there's a list of columns and a WHERE clause with IN and = followed by ABAP variables, no SQL expression):

INSERT ztable FROM ( SELECT bukrs, ... FROM zcview ).

BUKRS is the first key field of ZTABLE. ZTABLE has a client key field in the very first position.

ZCVIEW is a CDS entity view with this code (only inner join, no left outer join):

define view entity ZCVIEW
  as select from bkpf
  inner join ...
{
  key bkpf.bukrs,
  ...
  sum( ... ) as sum_...,
  ...
  cast(' ' as belnr_d) as extbelnr,
  ...
}
where ... // conditions against constants
group by ... // all fields before the sum fields

The description says to use ##NULL_VALUES to remove the warning. This works fine.

I'd like to know the reason why there is this warning.

I see in the ABAP documentation INSERT dbtab, source - Alternative 3 ( SELECT subquery_clauses ... ):

Null values to be inserted can be produced in the following cases:

  • As results of outer joins in the FORM clause of the subquery.
  • As results of SQL expressions in the SELECT list of the subquery.
  • If a field read by the subquery already contains a null value.

A catchable exception of exception class CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB is raised in the case of columns that are key fields of the DDIC database table or DDIC view to be filled. If it is known statically that null values can be inserted into key fields, a syntax check warning that can be hidden by the pragma null_values is produced.

There is no reason that NULL values can be inserted in the column BUKRS of ZTABLE because the source is the key column BUKRS of BKPF.

Is there a way to avoid the warning without using ##NULL_VALUES?

In what situation is the warning not sent with INSERT ztable FROM ( SELECT ... )?

Thank you.

Sandra

ABAP release: 7.58.

entry.title: Not able to insert/delete records in database table
entry.content: Executing "DELETE <dbtab>" from "SELECT" violates transactional contract "READ". getting this error when trying to delete entries from a custom database table in an unmanaged query class implementation.

entry.title: Personalization in sap mdg ui customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I just want to know how to create the personalization in sap mdg ui for customer screen.

On top of it, I would like to know how to bring the below settings so that the list of blocks are visible for the individual user.

Thanks in advance.

 

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: GOS attachment BADI implement GOS_SRV_SELECT
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I am trying to implement badi GOS_SRV_SELECT.  After Badi implimenting and save active successfully completed I got status runtime behaviour "Implementation will not be called" and BADI automatically inactive.

Please help.

 

Pradip Patel

entry.title: Update Address of SalesOrder Partnerfunction
entry.content:
Hi, 

we are currently working on a migration to an S4 Hana System (onPromise).

To implement a special business process, I need to change an address of a partner(function) of an existing salesorder. 
With the old SAP ERP System I used the BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE for this. 
To familiarise myself with new tools, I would like to solve this with RAP. 
I have implemented i_salesordertp and can e.g. change the customer number of the partner.
But how can I change the address of theses customer / salesorder partner function?

Is it even possible?
Or how can I solve this alternatively?

Thanks and best regards,
Helge

entry.title: Cds Documentation
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am unable to find the documentation for the following CDS views in the S/4HANA 1809 section:

I_PurchaseOrder
I_PurchaseOrderItem
I_Supplier
I_Customer
I_Product
I_Stock
I_Material
I_Movement
I_ProfitCenter
I_GLAccountLineItem
I_SalesAnalysis
I_Project
I_ProjectNetwork
I_SalesCondition

If I check the CDS views at this link, not all the standard CDS views are documented like the ones mentioned above
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ee6ff9b281d8448f96b4fe6c89f2bdc8/8573b810511948c8a99c0672abc159aa.html?locale=en-US&version=1809.latest

Does anyone know how to perform a more in-depth search or where I can find official documentation for these views?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to run BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC without commit?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

How to run BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC without commit?

Or mb there is another fm/bapi for delivery split?

entry.title: Issue with Displaying Sub-Screen Data After Posting in MIGO_GR (SAP ABAP)
entry.content: I am working on MIGO_GR and need to enter data in a sub-screen. When I click the Post button for Goods Receipt, the entered data should be displayed in Display mode after posting. However, I am struggling to find the right trigger point to ensure the data is retained and displayed correctly.
